zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Frethesanda de Munchensy於1140年4月1日出生在英國素福爾可艾德沃德斯同時，她的父親Warin de Munchensy28歲，母親Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshire15歲。她和William Paynell Lord of Hooton至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1202年10月2日在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾斯坦達德 希爾享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Frethesanda de Munchensy于1140年4月1日出生在英国素福爾可艾德沃德斯同时，她的父亲Warin de Munchensy28岁，母亲Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshire15岁。她和William Paynell Lord of Hooton至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1202年10月2日在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾斯坦達德 希爾享年62岁。

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Frethesanda de Munchensy was born on 1 April 1140, in Edwardstone, Suffolk, England, her father, Warin de Munchensy, was 28 and her mother, Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshire, was 15. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with William Paynell Lord of Hooton. She died on 2 October 1202, in Standard Hill, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Frethesanda de Munchensy est née le 1 avril 1140, à Edwardstone, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Warin de Munchensy, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshire, avait 15 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec William Paynell Lord of Hooton. Elle est décédée le 2 octobre 1202, à Standard Hill, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.Nottingham Castle, Nottinghamshire, Engl: Standard Hill, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Frethesanda de Munchensy am 1. April 1140 in Edwardstone, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Warin de Munchensy 28 und ihre Mutter Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshire 15. Sie hatte mit William Paynell Lord of Hooton mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. Oktober 1202 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Standard Hill, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Frethesanda de Munchensy è nata il il 1 aprile 1140 nel Edwardstone, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Warin de Munchensy, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshire, aveva 15 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con William Paynell Lord of Hooton. Morì il 2 ottobre 1202, nel Standard Hill, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Frethesanda de Munchensyが1140年4月1日にイギリススフォルクエドワードストーンで生まれた時，父Warin de Munchensyは28歳，母Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshireは15歳であった。彼女はWilliam Paynell Lord of Hootonとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1202年10月2日にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスタンダルド ヒルで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Frethesanda de Munchensy(이)가 1140년 4월 1일 영국 수폴크 에드워스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Warin de Munchensy(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshire(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 William Paynell Lord of Hooton(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1202년 10월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 스탠더르드 힐에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Frethesanda de Munchensy nasceu em 1 de abril de 1140, em Edwardstone, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Warin de Munchensy, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshire, tinha 15 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com William Paynell Lord of Hooton. Ela faleceu em 2 de outubro de 1202, em Standard Hill, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Frethesanda de Munchensy родилась 1 апреля 1140 г. в местности эдвардстоун, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Warin de Munchensy было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshire, 15. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от William Paynell Lord of Hooton. Она умерла 2 октября 1202 г. в местности стандард хилл, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con William Paynell Lord of Hooton. Murió el 2 de octubre de 1202, en Standard Hill, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años.
